entries.title: The very first steps
entries.todayLatin: This entry will be replaced after Lesson I has been genuinely completed. It will record what was easy, what was difficult, what remained challenging and what should happen next.
journal: The structure is ready, but Alan has not yet completed the lesson. This placeholder exists so the full publication workflow can be tested without inventing progress.

entries.title: Nouns: first patterns
entries.todayLatin: Lesson II is present as a demonstration of the reusable template. Its real account will be written from Alan’s notes, notebook image and reflections after he completes the lesson.
journal: This is not a claim that Lesson II has been studied. It shows where the genuine bus-journey reflection, corrections and evidence will appear when supplied.
